combined_text_for_llm: Nesting IF Functions in Excel "Nesting IF Functions in Excelby Debra Dalgleish · May 30, 2013The IF function lets you test something in Excel, and show one result if the test result is TRUE, and another result for FALSE. For example:=IF (“Debra met Excel MVPs last week”,”Show Picture”,”No Picture”)And yes, I did meet some Excel
